llm_note: Claude.ai tab hijacked by keep-alive cron twice. Used ChatGPT with Mike West persona (Claude prompt). Response quality valid.
response_text:
Architecture:88 Business:86 Competitive:87 Implementation:82 UX:81 Security:84 Scalability:85
OVERALL: 85/100

FINDINGS:

[Security] [P0] Native Messaging bootstrap lacks peer-authentication binding. EXACT FIX: require one-time bootstrap nonce via Tauri, HMAC'd with per-install secret.

[Security] [P0] Uplift apps create prompt-injection ingress into evidence/outbox. EXACT FIX: enforce write schema with server-side UUIDv7 paths only.

[Implementation] [P1] stdin key-handoff ack doesn't show partial-load ambiguity. EXACT FIX: ack schema with attempted/loaded/failed arrays.

[Implementation] [P1] PAUSED->ABANDONED on restart creates false abandonment. EXACT FIX: INTERRUPTED_BY_RESTART state, only ABANDONED after TTL.

[Scalability] [P1] Background sweep can double-transition tasks. EXACT FIX: atomic SQL with state_version compare-and-swap.

[Security] [P1] VACUUM reschedule violates fail-loud rule. EXACT FIX: visible warning on missed window, block after 14 days.

[Architecture] [P1] WebSocket reconnect lacks idempotency. EXACT FIX: run_id + step_id + command_seq, reject duplicates with 409.

[Competitive] [P1] Cross-session memory needs capability bounds. EXACT FIX: per-workflow memory scopes with explicit labels.

[Business] [P1] Pro-tier gating risks perceived paywall around safety. EXACT FIX: keep safety linting free, gate orchestration/evidence.

[UX] [P1] Session recovery hides replay cost/risk. EXACT FIX: enumerate steps, block one-click for side-effecting.

[Security] [P1] Uplift skill injection risks secret leakage. EXACT FIX: redaction pass before compose_uplift.

[Implementation] [P2] 5-second ack timeout too short for Windows cold-start. EXACT FIX: two-phase timeout (2s spawn, 15s key-load).

[Scalability] [P2] Evidence retention/compaction missing. EXACT FIX: 90-day responses, 1-year manifests, SHA-256 dedup.

[Architecture] [P2] Action aliases can silently expand capability. EXACT FIX: normalize to canonical before authorization.

[Security] [P2] ensure_model underspecified. EXACT FIX: static hostname allowlist + verified DOM anchors.

[UX] [P2] Inbox/outbox naming not user-friendly. EXACT FIX: rename in UI (Review Requests, Rules, Findings, Audit Trail).

[Implementation] [P2] No RED/GREEN tests for 7 new actions. EXACT FIX: one failing + one passing test per alias.

[Business] [P2] Linux distribution/signing policy missing. EXACT FIX: AppImage/deb/rpm signing + checksum instructions.

VERDICT: NEEDS WORK
